patches.summary: Validate resourceType via parameterized sqlite_master lookup before interpolating into SELECT in Store.ListIDs.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged the raw fmt.Sprintf table interpolation as a SQL injection sink (P1) — same finding the press already addressed for outlook-calendar via cli-printing-press#1000. Generated code still ships the pre-fix template here, so this patch closes it for this CLI until the template lands in the version of the press that prints this slug.

patches.summary: Compute `groups` aggregation from the full rows slice before --top truncation so it agrees with total_count.
patches.reason: Greptile (P1) — since's `groups` map was computed from already-truncated rows, so `total_count: 150` could ship alongside a groups map that only summed the displayed 10 messages. The fix moves groupSince() above the slice truncation.

patches.summary: Validate loadMessages OrderBy against a closed allowlist before concatenating into the SQL string.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged the raw `"ORDER BY " + order` concatenation. Every current caller passes a hardcoded literal, but the allowlist closes the future risk of a user- or config-derived value reaching this position; unrecognized values fall back to the default ordering.

patches.summary: Drop redundant ExcludeDrafts:true in followup and rename misnamed isTrue→isFalse so a single (more restrictive) draft filter remains.
patches.reason: Greptile observed that IsDraft=&false already emits `is_draft = 0`, which subsumes ExcludeDrafts's broader `(is_draft = 0 OR is_draft IS NULL)` clause. Dropping the redundant flag and renaming the misleading local var makes intent legible.
